scale.delta: AAVE TVL is 67% larger, user base 2.8x larger
scale.notes: AAVE clear market leader in lending TVL

capital_efficiency.delta: MKR generates $0.0115 revenue per $1 TVL vs AAVE $0.0097
capital_efficiency.notes: CDP model more capital efficient than pool-based lending

valuation.delta: MKR at 12.3x P/F vs AAVE 11.6x — essentially even
valuation.notes: Both reasonably valued vs DeFi peers

tokenomics.delta: AAVE fully circulating vs MKR ongoing Endgame changes
tokenomics.notes: MKR tokenomics in flux with SKY rebrand

governance.delta: AAVE stable governance vs Maker controversial Endgame
governance.notes: Maker governance risk higher due to complexity

AAVE: Larger and more active user base
MKR: Endgame could be transformative if successful

AAVE: Lower revenue efficiency than CDP model
GHO stablecoin still small vs DAI

research_notes: Quality protocols, different trade-offs. AAVE: growth + stability leader. MKR: efficiency + stablecoin dominance. AAVE better for growth investors comfortable with lending model. MKR for those betting on DAI persistence and Endgame success. Both reasonably valued. AAVE lower governance risk. MKR higher complexity, higher potential reward if Endgame works. Neither has near-term unlock risks.
